name: Check Cashing Plus
description_short: Check Cashing Plus operates retail financial services stores in New Jersey, offering check cashing, money transfers, money orders, bill payments, and related services without requiring a bank account.
description_long:
Check Cashing Plus is a New Jersey-based retail financial services provider operating at least two physical locations (4820 Bergenline Ave. and 2522 Bergenline Ave.). The company positions itself as customer-focused and innovative, with stated goals of serving the community and maintaining high standards for customer service and convenience. Founded on principles of integrity and excellence, the company serves customers who need immediate financial services without traditional banking relationships.

The company's core offerings center on check cashing for all check types (payroll, government benefits, insurance, tax refunds, business checks) with no bank account requirement and no waiting for checks to clear. Beyond check cashing, Check Cashing Plus provides Western Union money transfers, money orders, bill payment services for utilities and credit cards, prepaid MasterCard and Visa debit cards, ATM access, local and international cargo services, telephone reloads and prepaid phones, office services (translations, notary public, immigration assistance), passport photos, gift card-to-cash exchanges, and internet access workstations for document scanning and email.

The company distinguishes itself through convenience and accessibility for unbanked and underbanked populations. They offer multiple services under one roof, reducing the need to visit multiple providers. Their physical store locations in New Jersey's Bergen County area suggest a focus on serving local immigrant and working-class communities, which is reinforced by services like international transfers, cargo services, translations, and immigration assistance.

As a check-cashing business, Check Cashing Plus operates in a category typically associated with higher fees compared to traditional banking. While the website emphasizes convenience and speed (instant check cashing without bank account requirements), it provides no fee information, making cost comparison impossible from available data. The company's service breadth is notable, but the lack of transparency about pricing and any regulatory compliance information limits full assessment.
pros: No bank account required for check cashing — instant access to funds without waiting for checks to clear
Multiple service types under one roof including Western Union, money orders, bill payments, and cargo services
Serves underbanked populations with culturally relevant services like translations, immigration assistance, and international cargo
Offers prepaid debit cards (MasterCard/Visa) as a credit-free alternative to traditional credit cards
Two physical locations in Bergen County, New Jersey for in-person accessibility
Wide range of check types accepted including government benefits, tax refunds, business checks, and insurance checks
Office services including notary public, document scanning, and internet access workstations
cons: No fee schedule published on website — customers cannot determine costs before visiting
Limited geographic footprint with only two known locations in New Jersey
No online or mobile check cashing capability; customers must visit physical locations
Website lacks information about company history, ownership, or regulatory licenses/credentials
No mention of competitive rates, fee caps, or customer protections beyond general mission statement
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals who need immediate check cashing without a bank account
Working immigrant populations needing international money transfers, cargo services, and document translations
Customers in Bergen County, New Jersey seeking one-stop financial services and money transfers
diagnosis: Check Cashing Plus is best for unbanked or underbanked New Jersey residents who need immediate check cashing without a bank account and may require additional services like international transfers or translations. The critical caveat is that the website provides zero pricing transparency, making it impossible to evaluate whether their fees are competitive or fair without visiting a location in person.
services: Check cashing (payroll, government benefits, insurance, tax refunds, business checks)
Western Union money transfers (domestic and international)
Bill payments (utilities, credit cards, insurance, loans, cable, internet, phone)
Prepaid debit cards (MasterCard and Visa branded)
Telephone reloads and prepaid phone sales
Office services (translations, immigration application assistance, notary public)
Cash for gift cards (over 100 merchants accepted)
Internet service (document scanning, email access, resume printing)
meta_description: Check Cashing Plus offers check cashing, money transfers, bill payments, and financial services across New Jersey without a bank account.
